mapper.select: SELECT team_id, team_name, version FROM m_team ORDER BY team_id ASC
SELECT team_name FROM m_team WHERE team_id = #{teamId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM m_team WHERE team_name = #{teamName}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO m_team( team_name, first_create_date, last_modified_date, last_modified_user ) VALUES( #{teamName}, #{firstCreateDate}, #{lastModifiedDate}, #{lastModifiedUser} )
mapper.select: SELECT team_id, team_name, version FROM m_team WHERE team_id = #{teamId}
mapper.update: UPDATE m_team SET team_name = #{teamName}, last_modified_date = #{lastModifiedDate}, last_modified_user = #{lastModifiedUser}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE team_id = #{teamId} AND version = #{version}
